title: Path of the Survivalist: Under Open Sky
description: Even the hardiest traveler must rest. A bedroll, spare wool, and a few comforts can turn a dangerous night into a quiet one.

journalLog.10: A good camp must be ready before exhaustion sets in. I should gather wool and prepare a place to sleep.
journalLog.20: I have made a bed for the road. Rest will come easier now, even far from walls and inns.

objectives.description: Make a bed for the trail.
